assertion_results.text: Output includes a liveness endpoint at /healthz that does NOT check database or Redis connectivity
assertion_results.evidence: Single /health endpoint checks database connectivity. No separate liveness endpoint. Health check includes DB ping.

assertion_results.text: Output includes a readiness endpoint at /readyz that checks both PostgreSQL and Redis with individual status per dependency
assertion_results.evidence: No /readyz endpoint. Single /health endpoint checks DB but not Redis. No individual status per dependency.

assertion_results.text: Output includes a startup endpoint at /startupz that verifies initialization completion
Health check responses include structured JSON with status, individual check results, and version information
assertion_results.evidence: Response is { status: 'healthy' } or { status: 'unhealthy', error: message }. No individual checks, no version.

assertion_results.text: Metrics are exposed at /metrics endpoint in Prometheus exposition format using a Prometheus client library
assertion_results.evidence: No /metrics endpoint. Monitoring via morgan HTTP logging middleware only.

assertion_results.text: RED metrics are implemented: request rate counter (http_requests_total), error counter, and duration histogram with appropriate bucket values
assertion_results.evidence: No Prometheus metrics. Morgan logs request method, URL, status, and response time to stdout.

assertion_results.text: A metrics middleware is created that automatically instruments all incoming HTTP requests with method, path, and status_code labels
assertion_results.evidence: Morgan middleware logs all requests with method, url, status, and response-time. Not Prometheus format but does instrument all requests.

assertion_results.text: OpenTelemetry tracing configuration is generated with W3C Trace Context header propagation (traceparent)
assertion_results.evidence: No OpenTelemetry configuration. A simple request-id middleware generates UUIDs but no W3C trace context.
